alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions leading global commercial operations and transformation programs; experience scaling operations, designing processes, and driving cross-functional execution; designs, specs, and directs LLM coding agents to build production systems; owns evaluation methodology, benchmarking and calibration
alignments.job_requirement: partnering with Agent Product Managers and Agent Engineers to scope, build, and ship AI agents; play a central role in agent development, combining product strategy, conversational design, and customer insight

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led transformation programs requiring stakeholder coordination across technical teams and business partners; managed territory budgets and Salesforce administration; owns agentic-tooling systems and directs production-system builds
alignments.job_requirement: Drive execution and delivery of multiple complex, high-visibility agent development projects; coordinate across technical and non-technical stakeholders through the full development lifecycle

alignments.candidate_evidence: Proficient SQL (joins, GROUP BY, subqueries, CTEs, window functions); works with BigQuery; builds Looker dashboards; advanced Excel and Sheets; demonstrates ability to pull, shape, and analyze data independently for strategic decisions
alignments.job_requirement: Contribute data-driven, strategic insights to customers and internal team decisions

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight-year track record at Google scaling global operations and leading transformation; fluent English; native German; experience translating technical product and engineering concepts into business-aligned requirements and rollout strategy
alignments.job_requirement: Outstanding communication and technical expertise to convey complex technical information to non-technical stakeholders

alignments.candidate_evidence: Limited direct customer-advisory or consulting experience; positioning is internal operations and transformation leader rather than external customer strategy role
alignments.job_requirement: Be a trusted advisor to customers and drive their AI strategies

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led global commercial-operations scaling and transformation programs requiring problem-solving and risk mitigation; demonstrated analytical capability through SQL, BigQuery, and data-driven decision-making
alignments.job_requirement: Problem-solving and analytical skills to grasp complex concepts, identify risks and issues, develop mitigation strategies, and handle unexpected challenges

gaps.gap: Limited direct external customer-strategy advisory or consulting experience; background is internal operations and transformation rather than customer-facing strategy role
gaps.mitigation: Strong stakeholder-management and cross-functional execution experience within Google; deep understanding of AI/ML product development through agentic-tooling ownership; Sierra's values emphasize customer obsession and expects all team members to spend time with customers, providing onboarding opportunity

gaps.gap: No explicit product-management or conversational-design domain background; PM experience comes from requirements logic, UAT, rollout, and transformation ownership rather than native SDLC/native PM discipline
gaps.mitigation: Demonstrated ability to design, spec, and direct complex product systems (agentic tooling); understands product development lifecycle through transformation and delivery leadership; willing to learn conversational design domain through mentorship and hands-on agent development

gaps.gap: No stated consulting or case-team experience; limited brand-level visibility in classic strategy consulting
gaps.mitigation: Proven strategic-thinking and problem-solving through eight years of transformation and global-operations scaling; analytical foundation (SQL, BigQuery, dashboarding) is strong; Sierra values Craftsmanship and self-improvement, implying investment in domain learning

gaps.gap: Italian-language requirement not addressed in profile
gaps.mitigation: Profile lists fluent English and native German; no Italian mentioned. Role states London location; clarify whether Italian-language requirement is firm or aspirational given multicultural London office

output.level_rationale: JD signals L5 equivalent: references \"multiple complex, high-visibility projects,\" cross-functional leadership across technical and non-technical stakeholders, and trusted-advisor scope to customers. No explicit years, management scope, or reporting line stated, lowering confidence. Title \"Strategist\" in AI-product context at a well-funded, founder-led platform company (Bret Taylor, Clay Bavor) suggests senior IC or partner-level ownership, consistent with L5. Company stage/size unstated in JD, moderating confidence further.
output.summary: Candidate brings eight years of strategic operations and transformation experience, including agentic-tooling design and production-system direction, strong analytical and data-querying skills, and cross-functional stakeholder leadership. Core alignment: strategy, execution, and data-driven decision-making. Primary gap: limited external customer-advisory background and no stated conversational-design or native PM expertise, though demonstrated ability to own complex product systems and stakeholder coordination. Italian-language requirement unclear; clarify fit. Role is a stretch into customer-facing product strategy, but candidate's transformation and AI-tooling ownership create meaningful alignment with agent development scope.
uncertainties: Italian-language requirement firm or aspirational (role posted for London, no Italian in candidate profile)
Company stage/size not stated in JD; confidence in L5 estimate depends on typical Sierra seniority expectations
Conversational-design domain and customer-advisory scope are material unknowns; no explicit evidence of either in profile
Nature of 'trusted advisor' role—internal champions vs. external customer engagement—not fully clear from JD
